title: Non-record: Depth recurrence + widening + QAT + sliding window eval
body:
## Summary

- 3 physical transformer blocks looped 3x (9 effective layers) with per-loop rank-4 LoRA adapters on Q/K/V/O
- Model widened to dim 768, 12 query heads, 4 KV heads (GQA 3:1)
- Factorized embedding (ALBERT-style: 4096x128 + 128x768) for SP4096 vocabulary
- Int6-range quantization (values clamped to [-31,31]) with zlib compression
- QAT with STE throughout training (amax-based, compile-time constant)
- Sliding window evaluation (stride 64) following the pattern from merged PR #50
- NTK-aware RoPE scaling for eval-time length extension
- Configurable export: `QUANT_BITS=6|8`, `COMPRESSOR=zlib|zstd`

## Status

**Non-record submission — not yet validated on H100.** Submitting to enable compute grant application. Step time, artifact size, and BPB will be updated after hardware validation.

## Test plan

- [ ] Validate step time on 1xH100 (target: <110ms at dim=768 seq=2048)
- [ ] Full 8xH100 run with 10-minute cap
- [ ] Measure trained artifact size (target: <16MB)
- [ ] Multi-seed BPB validation (3+ seeds, p<0.01)
- [ ] Compare sliding window vs standard eval BPB

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
